name: io.github.perceptdot/sentry
title: Perceptdot Sentry
description: AI agent vision for Sentry error tracking with automatic ROI measurement and reporting.

environmentVariables.name: SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Sentry auth token. Generate at Sentry > Settings > Auth Tokens.

environmentVariables.name: PERCEPT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: perceptdot API key (free 200 checks at perceptdot.com)
